name: Nora Gitsune
description:
__Debut:__ Chapter 598; Episode 518 
__Affiliations:__ Fake Straw Hat Crew 
__Occupation:__ Pet 
__Height:__ 103 cm (3'4")
 
Nora Gitsune is a fox who filled the role of the "pet" for the Fake Straw Hat Crew, who did not know that the real [Chopper](https://anilist.co/character/309/Chopper-Tony-Tony) is the crew's doctor and is given human-traits by the Hito Hito no Mi.
